testcase.name: testQueryAndPathParam

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected cookie "AEC" was not "AaJma5ukyO3FnBqi0n93vrjAjzjVK9o1WlYcmo11ghyoJkZ9zZvl7cCi9L8", was "AaJma5s7xkvekSzn2YdENI0iIC68BSZHUoJNOv6xoKKLxtMbe8C8p7NJZp8".

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Expected cookie "AEC" was not "AaJma5ukyO3FnBqi0n93vrjAjzjVK9o1WlYcmo11ghyoJkZ9zZvl7cCi9L8", was "AaJma5s7xkvekSzn2YdENI0iIC68BSZHUoJNOv6xoKKLxtMbe8C8p7NJZp8".
